   \text{Post-money} = \$28.6\text{ billion} + \$5.5\text{ billion} = \$34.1\text{ billion}
   \]

   \[
   \text{Ownership \%} = \left(\frac{\text{Raise}}{\text{Post-money}}\right) \times 100
   \]
   \[
   \text{Ownership \%} = \left(\frac{\$5.5\text{ billion}}{\$34.1\text{ billion}}\right) \times 100
   \]

Now we perform the division:
   \[
   \frac{\$5.5}{\$34.1} \approx 0.1609756
   \]

Finally, multiply by 100 to get the percentage:
   \[
   0.1609756 \times 100 \approx 16.09756
   \]

Rounding to two decimal places gives us:
   \[
   16.10
   \]

Therefore, the answer is 16.10.
